mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_PURCHASE (S_ID, S_TENANT_ID, S_PURCHASE_NO, S_SUPPLIER_ID, S_WAREHOUSE_ID, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, DT_PURCHASE_TIME, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sTenantId}, #{sPurchaseNo}, #{sSupplierId}, #{sWarehouseId}, #{iTotalAmount}, #{dtPurchaseTime}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT S_ID, S_PURCHASE_NO, S_SUPPLIER_ID, S_WAREHOUSE_ID, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, DT_PURCHASE_TIME, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_PURCHASE WHERE S_ID = #{sId}

SELECT S_ID, S_PURCHASE_NO, S_SUPPLIER_ID, S_WAREHOUSE_ID, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, DT_PURCHASE_TIME, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_PURCHASE
ORDER BY DT_PURCHASE_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
